summer_tips.title: Stay Hydrated
summer_tips.description: Drink plenty of water throughout the day to keep your body cool and energized

summer_tips.title: Use Sunscreen
summer_tips.description: Protect your skin with SPF 30+ sunscreen to prevent harmful UV damage

summer_tips.title: Wear Light Clothes
summer_tips.description: Choose breathable, light-colored fabrics for maximum comfort

summer_tips.title: Seek Shade
summer_tips.description: Avoid direct sunlight during peak hours (10 AM - 4 PM)
